title: gymnadenia elata
intro: Gymnadenia elata, also known as the tall fragrant orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia elata include relieving congestion, soothing a sore throat, and reducing fever. Gymnadenia elata is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
